name: get_stock
description: Retrieves the stock record for a specific product.

description: Retrieves all stock records from the database.
signature: pub fn get_all_stocks(key: String) -> Result<Vec<Stock>, String>

name: insert_stock
description: Inserts a new stock record for a product. Validates the quantity range and ensures the product exists.

name: update_stock
description: Updates the quantity of an existing stock record.
signature: pub fn update_stock(key: String, product_id: i32, quantity: i32) -> Result<Stock, String>

name: remove_stock
description: Removes a stock record by its ID.
signature: pub fn remove_stock(key: String, stock_id: i32) -> Result<usize, String>

name: export_stock_data
description: Exports all stock data to a file (CSV, XLSX, or ODS).

name: import_stock_data
description: Imports stock data from a file (CSV, XLSX, or ODS). Updates existing stock records or inserts new ones. Emits progress events to the frontend during the import.

name: get_settings
description: Retrieves the current application settings. #[command]

description: Saves the provided application settings to disk. #[command]

name: get_storage_info
description: Retrieves information about the current application storage and data paths. #[command]

name: migrate_image_directory
description: Migrates the image storage directory to a new path. Moves all existing image files to the new location and updates their database paths. Restricted to subdirectories of the application's local data directory for security. #[command]

description: Adds a new item (material) to a recipe list. Scales the volume use based on the provided precision.

name: create_invoice
description: Represents an accumulated report of products and materials sold within a date range. #[derive(Serialize)] pub struct AccumulatedReport { pub products: Vec<ProductAccumulation>, pub materials: Vec<MaterialAccumulation>, } Represents the total quantity of a specific product sold. #[derive(Serialize)] pub struct ProductAccumulation { pub product_id: i32, pub title: String, pub total_quantity: i64, } Represents the total volume of a specific material used in products sold. #[derive(Serialize)] pub struct MaterialAccumulation { pub material_id: i32, pub name: String, pub total_volume_used: i64, pub precision: i32, } Creates a new invoice (receipt header) for an optional customer.
signature: pub fn create_invoice(key: String, customer_id: Option<i32>) -> Result<ReceiptList, String>

name: add_invoice_items
description: Adds items to an existing invoice and updates stock levels accordingly. Supports both direct product stock and recipe-based material stock.

name: get_invoice_detail
description: Retrieves the header and all items for a specific invoice.

name: get_invoices_by_date
description: Retrieves all invoices created within a specific Unix timestamp range.

name: get_accumulated_report
description: Generates an accumulated report of products and materials sold within a date range.

description: Creates a new product with the specified details. Validates input length, price range, and ensures the product name is unique.

name: update_product
description: Updates an existing product's information. Performs validation on title length, price, and ensures name uniqueness. Also synchronizes the product price in the stock records.

name: delete_product
description: Deletes a product by its ID. Before deletion, checks if the product is referenced in past receipts. Cleans up associated stock records and image links.
signature: pub fn delete_product(key: String, id: i32) -> Result<usize, String>

name: run_migrations
description: Embedded database migrations for SQLite. pub const MIGRATIONS: EmbeddedMigrations = embed_migrations!(); Runs all pending database migrations.

name: get_database_path
description: Gets the absolute path to the SQLite database file. Checks for a custom path override in `settings.json` within the app data directory.

name: establish_connection
description: Helper to extract the custom DB storage path from settings.json fn read_custom_db_storage_path(data_dir: &Path) -> Option<PathBuf> { let settings_path = data_dir.join("settings.json"); let content = fs::read_to_string(settings_path).ok()?; let json: serde_json::Value = serde_json::from_str(&content).ok()?; json.get("db_storage_path") .and_then(|v| v.as_str()) .map(PathBuf::from) } Establishes a connection to the encrypted (or soon-to-be encrypted) database.

name: get_datetime
description: Represents a receipt header, storing high-level transaction information. #[derive(Queryable, Selectable, Serialize, Identifiable, Debug, Clone)] #[diesel(table_name = receipt_list)] #[diesel(primary_key(receipt_id))] pub struct ReceiptList { Unique identifier for the receipt. pub receipt_id: i32, Unix timestamp when the transaction occurred. pub datetime_unix: i64, Optional ID of the customer associated with this transaction. pub customer_id: Option<i32>, } impl ReceiptList { Convert the stored Unix timestamp to a readable Date Pass `offset_hours` to adjust the timezone (e.g., 7 for Thailand)
signature: pub fn get_datetime(&self, offset_hours: i32) -> Option<NaiveDateTime>
